debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ onto f ↔ range f = Univ V

proof:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro _
      trivial
    · intro _
      apply h
  · intro h y
    change y ∈ range f
    rw [h]
    trivial

    · intro _

  · intro h y

    trivial

  apply Iff.intro
